# claude-code-conversation-colors

> Customize text colors for your messages and Claude's responses in Claude Code terminal sessions. Visual color picker with RGB sliders. Works on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

## What it does
- Interactive color picker to set distinct colors for user messages and Claude's responses
- RGB sliders and direct hex value entry
- Toggle gray message background on or off
- Settings persist across terminal restarts and new sessions
- Survives Claude Code updates — no patching, no hacking internals
- Reapply saved colors after updates with --reapply flag
- Uninstall cleanly with --uninstall flag

## Install
brew tap ProducerGuy/claude-code-conversation-colors && brew install claude-colors

Or via curl:
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ProducerGuy/claude-code-conversation-colors/main/install.sh | bash

## Links
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ProducerGuy/claude-code-conversation-colors)
- [Homebrew Tap](https://github.com/ProducerGuy/homebrew-claude-code-conversation-colors)
